message:
feat(core): retained autocommit overlay fast path and MVCC GC removal

Major connection.rs overhaul adding a fast query path that serves reads
directly from the retained autocommit transaction's pager-backed B-tree
without flushing, and removing all GC scheduler infrastructure in favor
of the new EBR reclamation.

Retained autocommit overlay (~570 lines):
- RetainedAutocommitOverlayFastPath enum with 5 variants: CountStar,
  CountStarSum, RowidLookup, RowidRangeScan, CountStarRowidRange
- retained_autocommit_overlay_dirty_fast_path() classifies queries
  that can be served from the dirty overlay without flush
- try_execute_retained_autocommit_query_fast_path() and query_row
  variant execute directly via pager B-tree cursors
- decode_table_row_values_from_payload(): parses SQLite record payloads
  with IPK alias patching and column count padding with defaults
- New counters: FSQLITE_RETAINED_AUTOCOMMIT_OVERLAY_HITS/MISSES
- Injected into execute_prepared_query, _streaming, and _query_row
  before the normal prepared-read/fast-path flow

GC scheduler removal:
- Removed GcScheduler, GcTickResult, GcTodo imports and all GC-related
  fields (gc_scheduler, gc_todo, gc_clock_millis)
- Deleted maybe_gc_tick(), gc_tick_now(), compute_gc_horizon(),
  gc_enqueue_page() methods (~110 lines)
- Removed all maybe_gc_tick() call sites from commit, rollback,
  savepoint-rollback, and concurrent-rollback paths

Other fast-path improvements:
- PreparedDirectSimpleInsertLane enum (DirectCompiled vs
  ReusableTableProgram) with proper classification heuristic
- MemDB query path: checks pager.is_memory() instead of path == ":memory:"
- Indexed equality query_row: uses prepared_indexed_equality_rowids()
  for index lookup + single rowid fetch instead of full table scan
- Rowid range query_row: Integer-only param validation
- mark_storage_root_page_dirty() replaces cursor-to-root lookup
- Memory-backed retained autocommit: reload_memdb_rows_from_txn on park

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
